channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Selena's killer, Yolanda Saldívar, files for parole, begins review process
item.description: Saldívar, now 64 years-old, was sentenced to life in prison on Oct. 26, 1995, with the possibility of parole after 30 years.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Mendez, KREX 5

item.title: Have an extra $4 million? You could buy the 'Breaking Bad' house
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — The house made famous by the “Breaking Bad” TV series is up for sale, and the owners of the otherwise unassuming home in one of Albuquerque’s older neighborhoods are hoping the property’s role in the long-running series will help them fetch a pretty penny.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In-N-Out opening new restaurants across several states in 2025 and beyond: Here's where
item.description: The burger chain, which does not franchise its restaurants, currently keeps its operations (mostly) to the Western half of the country.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Montenegro to tackle gun control after mass killing left 12 dead
item.description: PODGORICA, Montenegro (AP) — A top-level meeting in Montenegro on Friday promised tough measures to curb illegal weapons after a gunman fatally shot 12 people in a second such tragedy in less than three years in the small Balkan country.
item.dc:creator: PREDRAG MILIC, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Orleans barricade oversight in 'target area for terrorism' during prime season raises concerns
item.description: New Orleans locals and visitors have been questioning why a temporary barrier intended to prevent cars from entering Bourbon Street was set down instead of up on Jan. 1.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-employee charged after babies found with 'unexplainable fractures' at Virginia hospital
item.description: The charges comes after the hospital said three babies were discovered with "unexplainable fractures" in late November and December of 2024. A similar incident took place the previous year.
item.dc:creator: Katelyn Harlow, KTLA 5

item.title: Finalized tax credit for cleaner hydrogen gets a cautious OK from some environmental groups
item.description: The Biden administration released long-awaited final rules Friday for a tax credit that will send billions of dollars to producers of cleaner hydrogen.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Former 'Home Improvement' star Zachery Ty Bryan jailed
item.description: Former "Home Improvement" star Zachery Ty Bryan was arrested this week on a domestic violence charge in South Carolina, online jail records show.
item.dc:creator: Caleb McCusker, KRON4

item.title: New videos paint clearer picture of Trump Hotel Cybertruck explosion in Las Vegas
item.description: Two new videos have been released in relation to Wednesday's Cybertruck explosion outside the Trump International Hotel in Las Vegas where a former Army soldier died.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Authorities suspect gang members killed 7 workers at a California marijuana farm in 2020
item.description: Authorities in Southern California are pleading with people to come forward with any information about the 2020 shooting deaths of seven Laotian workers at an illegal marijuana farm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Verizon to bring Super Bowl FanFest to Sofi, other NFL stadiums nationwide
item.description: The Caesars Superdome may be the home for the Super Bowl in New Orleans next month, but this year, festivities will extend far beyond the Bayou State, thanks to Verizon.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Nearly 700 Party City store leases heading to auction
item.description: Nearly 700 Party City store leases will be heading to auction next month, according to an announcement Friday.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court strikes down Biden net neutrality rules
item.description: A federal appeals court ruled this week the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) lacked the authority to restore certain net neutrality rules last year, handing a blow to FCC Democrats and Biden administration officials who pushed for revived open internet measures.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to donate funds, blood after fatal Bourbon Street attack
item.description: As the City of New Orleans begins to recover from a fatal attack on Bourbon Street on New Year's Day, efforts are underway to help victims and their families.
item.dc:creator: Bella Dardano, ABC 4

item.title: Republicans' trust in accuracy of US elections jumps after Trump's win, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A majority of Republicans say they are confident in the 2024 vote count after Donald Trump’s win, according to a new poll that finds a sharp turnaround from GOP voters’ skepticism about U.S.
item.dc:creator: LINLEY SANDERS and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden awards Medal of Honor to seven US Army soldiers
item.description: President Biden on Friday awarded the Medal of Honor to seven U.S. Army soldiers, most of whom received it posthumously for service during the Korea War, in his last ceremony as commander-in-chief awarding the country’s highest military honor.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Biden awards Medal of Honor to seven US Army soldiers
item.description: President Biden on Friday awarded the Medal of Honor to seven U.S. Army soldiers, most of whom received it posthumously for service during the Korea War, in his last ceremony as commander-in-chief awarding the country’s highest military honor.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, NewsNation

item.title: FBI releases new video of suspect planting pipe bomb on eve of Capitol riot
item.description: A harrowing chapter in American history remains shrouded in mystery: Who planted pipe bombs outside offices of the Democratic and Republican national committees in Washington on the eve of the attack on the Capitol?
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here’s what Congress’s first day will look like
item.description: The 119th Congress kicks off Friday as lawmakers return to Washington with a long January to-do list and a packed first day. Confirmation hearings for President-elect Trump’s Cabinet nominees are set to get rolling in the coming weeks, and Trump himself will be inaugurated in less than three weeks.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, WGN 9

item.title: New Orleans revelers narrowly escape path of speeding truck in 'tactic of choice among terrorists': expert
item.description: A video from Bourbon Street in New Orleans shows Shamsud-Din Jabbar driving a pickup truck toward a crowd of revelers, who narrowly escape the path of the fast-moving vehicle on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Orleans terrorist chose Bourbon Street for maximum carnage: timeline
item.description: New Orleans terrorist Shamsud-Din Jabbar had originally planned to attack his own friends and family but wanted to do more damage to highlight a religious 'war.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 dead and 19 injured in Southern California plane crash
item.description: FULLERTON, Calif. (AP) — Two people died and 19 were injured Thursday when a small plane crashed through the roof of a sprawling furniture manufacturing building in Southern California where at least 200 people were working, police said.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING and DAMIAN DOVARGANES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Orleans attacker had suspected bomb materials at home, reserved truck weeks ago, officials say
item.description: Law enforcement officials say the man who rammed a truck into a New Year's crowd had suspected bomb-making materials at his home and reserved the rental vehicle used in the attack weeks earlier.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Jim Mustian, Kevin Mcgill And Jack Brook, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: FBI releases video showing January 2021 pipe bomb suspect planting device outside DNC, RNC offices in DC
item.description: The FBI on Thursday released a new video showing the 2021 Washington, D.C. pipe bomb suspect planting the first bomb near a bench outside of the DNC office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden awards the 2nd highest civilian award to leaders of the Jan. 6 committee and 18 others
item.description: President Joe Biden on Thursday awarded the second highest civilian medal to Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson, leaders of the congressional investigation into the Capitol riot who Donald Trump has said should be jailed for their roles in the inquiry.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FBI says driver in New Orleans rampage acted alone and was '100%' inspired by Islamic State group
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The Army veteran who drove a pickup truck into a crowd of New Year’s revelers in New Orleans acted alone, the FBI said Thursday, reversing its position from a day earlier that he likely worked with others in the deadly attack that officials said was inspired by the Islamic State g
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, JIM MUSTIAN, KEVIN McGILL and JACK BROOK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Downtown Omaha loses power for hours after a garbage truck gets stuck in a sinkhole
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A large portion of downtown Omaha lost power for several hours Thursday after a garbage truck got stuck in a sinkhole where utility lines had become exposed. The truck became stuck around 8 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cybertruck explosion marks second high-profile incident at Trump's Las Vegas hotel
item.description: The Cybertruck fire and explosion was preceded by a 2021 bomb threat that was meant to serve as a message to Trump.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KRON4

item.title: Chief Justice John Roberts defends judicial independence, says it is under threat in several ways
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Chief Justice John Roberts issued a defense Tuesday of judicial independence, which he said is under threat from intimidation, disinformation and the prospect of public officials defying court orders. Roberts laid out his concerns in his annual report on the federal judiciary.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Deputies are stuck using radios with Los Angeles County's dispatch system out of commission
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The archaic computer dispatch system for the nation's largest sheriff's department remained out of commission on Thursday after crashing on New Year's Eve, forcing deputies to handle all calls by radio, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: John Capodice, actor who appeared in 'Ace Ventura,' 'Seinfeld' and more, dies at 83
item.description: News of Capodice’s death on Monday was publicly announced in an obituary posted by the Pizzi Funeral Home in Northvale, New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Soldier in Las Vegas Cybertruck explosion had gunshot wound to head: sheriff
item.description: The man who drove a Tesla Cybertruck that exploded outside of a Las Vegas, Nevada hotel has been identified as Matthew Livelsberger, an Army soldier from Colorado, a law enforcement source told NewsNation.
item.dc:creator: Travis Harrison, KRON4

item.title: Meet the Danish-Swedish farmdog, the newest breed in the American Kennel Club's lineup
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Say hello to the latest dog in the American Kennel Club's lineup of recognized breeds. Or you might say “hej.” The Danish-Swedish farmdog — yep, that's the official name — joined the pack Thursday.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: An aspiring nurse, football star, single mother and father of 2 killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: An 18-year-old girl dreaming of becoming a nurse, a single mother, a father of two and a former Princeton football star suffered fatal injuries when the driver of a white pickup truck sped down Bourbon Street, packed with holiday revelers early Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FBI says it thwarted apparent plot against AIPAC
item.description: Law enforcement arrested Forrest Kendall Pemberton after he allegedly traveled to Plantation, Fla., in search of AIPAC’s office with several firearms, including an AR-15 rifle.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, ABC 4

item.title: NYE drone show canceled on Folly Beach after drones fall from sky; at least 1 injured
item.description: FOLLY BEACH, S.C. (WCBD) - A new drone show on Folly Beach was canceled Tuesday night after the drones malfunctioned and fell from the sky. Organizers completed two drone displays before they all went down, News 2 learned.
item.dc:creator: Tim Renaud, WGN 9

item.title: Person pushed onto NYC subway tracks before oncoming train: police
item.description: The alleged attack comes just days after a 57-year-old woman was fatally set on fire aboard a subway train.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, Fox 5
